title: Furry Fruit Basket
body:
# Furry Fruit Basket - Create and Cobblemon
Welcome to **Furry Fruit Basket**, where cobblemon meets create with other added mods as the community feels.

This modpack was created as a community modpack for whoisallo's streams.

Please ensure you give the modpack a minimum of 8GB of ram. Its hefty...

The built-in server is no longer running.
